case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $963.20 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:  $963.20 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DILLARD, TAURICE

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:  $963.20 U.S. CURRENCY $963.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $963.20, JUDGMENT OF FOREFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS DECLARED FORFEITED. $481,60 TO CLAIMANT TAURICE DILLARD. $481.60 FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF FOREFITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
